entities.name: CHICKPEA

entities.name: DROUGHT TOLERANCE
entities.description: The ability of a plant to withstand drought stress

entities.name: CROP PRODUCTIVITY
entities.description: The measure of agricultural output per unit area

entities.name: DROUGHT STRESS
entities.description: Environmental condition characterized by lack of water

entities.name: INTEGRATED GENOMICS-ASSISTED BREEDING
entities.description: A breeding approach combining genomics and traditional breeding

entities.name: FUNCTIONAL GENOMICS STRATEGY
entities.description: Approach to determine the function of genes and their interactions

entities.name: ASSOCIATION MAPPING
entities.description: Method to link genetic markers to traits using a population

entities.name: FINE MAPPING
entities.description: Method to narrow down the genomic region containing a gene

entities.name: MAP-BASED CLONING
entities.description: Method to isolate a gene based on its map position

entities.name: MOLECULAR HAPLOTYPING
entities.description: Analysis of a set of linked genetic variants

entities.name: TRANSCRIPT PROFILING
entities.description: Analysis of RNA expression levels

entities.name: INTROGRESSION LINES
entities.description: Lines created by transferring a genetic segment from one variety to another

entities.name: NEAR ISOGENIC LINES
entities.description: Lines that are genetically identical except for a small specific region

entities.name: BHLH TRANSCRIPTION FACTOR
entities.description: A class of proteins that bind to DNA to regulate gene expression

entities.name: CABHLH10
entities.description: A specific bHLH transcription factor in chickpea

entities.name: QTL
entities.description: Quantitative Trait Locus, a region of DNA associated with a quantitative trait

entities.name: YIELD TRAITS
entities.description: Characteristics related to the total output of the crop

entities.name: G-BOX PROMOTER ELEMENT
entities.description: A cis-regulatory DNA sequence in the promoter region

entities.name: RD22
entities.description: A gene responsive to desiccation and abscisic acid

entities.name: ABSCISIC ACID
entities.description: A plant hormone involved in stress responses

entities.name: TRANS-EXPRESSION QTL
entities.description: A QTL that regulates the expression of a gene at a different genomic location

entities.name: PHOTOSYNTHETIC EFFICIENCY
entities.description: The efficiency with which a plant converts light energy into chemical energy

entities.name: ROOT BIOMASS
entities.description: The total mass of the root system

entities.name: SHOOT BIOMASS
entities.description: The total mass of the above-ground plant parts

entities.name: YIELD
entities.description: The amount of crop produced per unit area

entities.name: PRODUCTIVITY
entities.description: The rate of production of the crop

entities.name: AGRONOMIC PERFORMANCE
entities.description: Overall performance of the crop in field conditions

entities.name: OVEREXPRESSION
entities.description: Increasing the expression level of a gene

entities.name: ARABIDOPSIS
entities.description: Arabidopsis thaliana, a model plant used for genetic studies

entities.name: TRANSLATIONAL GENOMICS
entities.description: The application of genomic findings to crop improvement
